book.Title: {{rainbow|Moon Regent}} {{r|fever}}
book.page: There is only one =subject.RegalTitle=, and it is me!!
Oh ho! A pretender =subject.RegalTitle= come for my crown?!
I must save Qud! If you will not join me, then you stand in my way!!
You must help me find a {{C|trinket}}! Quickly, give me all of your belongings!!
You're merely a {{R|starapple}} 'twixt two {{y|clouds}} compared to me!!
{{emote|*licks lips*}} You are infected. Better amputate everything, just to be sure!!
I will drink from you, my flaming vessel!!
Those are some high tier wares! Let me pour some {{cloning|draught}} on you!!
See this card?! You cannot unauthorize me!!
I accuse you of trade and illness!!
Poor little {{c|waydroid}}, you need some fixing!!
Do you swear to unvex me?!
Come, breathe deep the amaranthine ashes!!
I have performed your task! Now, give me my due!!
